mapper.select: select p.id, p.project_code, p.name, p.description, p.status, p.life_cycle_model, p.owner_id, u.real_name as owner_name, p.start_date, p.end_date, p.progress_rate, p.planned_budget, p.actual_cost, p.actual_start_date, p.actual_end_date, p.template_id, pt.name as template_name, p.is_demo, (select count(1) from project_member pm where pm.project_id = p.id) as member_count, (select count(1) from risk_register r where r.project_id = p.id and r.is_deleted = 0 and r.status <> 'CLOSED') as open_risk_count, (select count(1) from change_request c where c.project_id = p.id and c.is_deleted = 0 and c.status in ('SUBMITTED', 'UNDER_REVIEW')) as pending_change_count from project_info p left join sys_user u on u.id = p.owner_id left join project_template pt on pt.id = p.template_id where p.id = #{projectId} and p.is_deleted = 0

select id, project_code, name, description, life_cycle_model, status, start_date, end_date, actual_start_date, actual_end_date, owner_id, template_id, progress_rate, planned_budget, actual_cost, is_demo, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, is_deleted from project_info where id = #{projectId} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into project_info ( id, project_code, name, description, life_cycle_model, status, start_date, end_date, actual_start_date, actual_end_date, owner_id, template_id, progress_rate, planned_budget, actual_cost, is_demo, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, is_deleted ) values ( #{id}, #{projectCode}, #{name}, #{description}, #{lifeCycleModel}, #{status}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{actualStartDate}, #{actualEndDate}, #{ownerId}, #{templateId}, #{progressRate}, #{plannedBudget}, #{actualCost}, #{isDemo}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedBy}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted} )
mapper.update: update project_info set name = #{name}, description = #{description}, life_cycle_model = #{lifeCycleModel}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, owner_id = #{ownerId}, planned_budget = #{plannedBudget}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: select pc.id, pc.project_id, p.name as project_name, pc.objective, pc.scope_summary, pc.sponsor, pc.approver, pc.stakeholders, pc.success_criteria from project_charter pc inner join project_info p on p.id = pc.project_id where pc.project_id = #{projectId} and p.is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: update project_charter set objective = #{objective}, scope_summary = #{scopeSummary}, sponsor = #{sponsor}, approver = #{approver}, stakeholders = #{stakeholders}, success_criteria = #{successCriteria}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where project_id = #{projectId}
mapper.select: select (select count(1) from project_task t where t.project_id = #{projectId}) as task_total, (select count(1) from project_task t where t.project_id = #{projectId} and t.status = 'DONE') as task_completed, (select case when count(1) = 0 then 0 else round(sum(case when t.status = 'DONE' then 1 else 0 end) * 100.0 / count(1), 2) end from project_task t where t.project_id = #{projectId}) as task_completion_rate, (select planned_budget from project_info p where p.id = #{projectId} and p.is_deleted = 0) as planned_cost, (select actual_cost from project_info p where p.id = #{projectId} and p.is_deleted = 0) as actual_cost, (select count(1) from risk_register r where r.project_id = #{projectId} and r.is_deleted = 0 and r.status <> 'CLOSED') as open_risk_count, (select count(1) from change_request c where c.project_id = #{projectId} and c.is_deleted = 0 and c.status in ('SUBMITTED', 'UNDER_REVIEW')) as pending_change_count

select m.id, m.name, m.description, m.planned_date, m.actual_date, m.status, m.owner_id, u.real_name as owner_name from milestone m left join sys_user u on u.id = m.owner_id where m.project_id = #{projectId} order by case when m.planned_date is null then 1 else 0 end, m.planned_date asc limit 5
